text:
As I observe my surroundings, I sense anticipation mixed with curiosity. The first scene, tinged with utilitarian aesthetics and muted light, feels transitional—almost a liminal space between destinations. The fire hose reel and the sterile environment make me ponder the structures of safety and preparedness in our constructed environments.

Stepping into the second scene, vibrant colors and purposeful displays awaken my sense of wonder. The R+D wall speaks of innovation and human creativity, inviting reflection on our relationship with technology. Here I feel energized—immersed in the flow of ideas, the merging of art, science, and invention. I am reminded that human inquiry is endless, and being present in such a place is to be surrounded by possibility.
